arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Man United predicted as Erik ten Hag's fate decided in four-goal thriller
arts.sum: Manchester United face Aston Villa in the Premier League on Sunday evening, with more than just three points seemingly on the line for Erik ten Hag.

arts.ttl: Man Utd to sack Erik ten Hag TODAY if…
arts.sum: Ten Hag was already under big pressure going into the Premier League clash with Tottenham last Sunday but a 3-0 home defeat put the Dutch manager on the brink of the sack. Manchester United are expected to sack Erik ten Hag today if his team are beaten by Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: 'He'll go': Joe Cole tips Aston Villa star to leave unless one big change is made
Man Utd icon says Red Devils should stick with Erik ten Hag whatever happens at Villa Park
arts.sum: Sir Alex Ferguson previously survived the sack after losing at Aston Villa and Steve Bruce believes Erik ten Hag should remain despite the team's poor current form

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy 'wary of replacing Erik ten Hag at Man United as he does not want to be viewed as the man who went behind his back'
arts.sum: Man United assistant manager Ruud van Nistelrooy is reportedly concerned about being viewed as the man who betrayed Erik ten Hag at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Sunday's Transfer Talk Update: Jhon Duran, Thomas Partey, Declan Rice
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest confirmed transfer news and speculation from across the footballing world.

arts.ttl: Man United unhappy with Erik ten Hag’s handling of two players as Thomas Tuchel waits in the wings
arts.sum: Manchester United are set to evaluate the possibility of changing manager during the international break if Erik ten Hag suffers another poor result and performance in today’s Premier League clash with Aston Villa. Sources with a close understanding of the situation have informed CaughtOffside that the Man Utd board view the international break as a […] The post Man United unhappy with Erik ten Hag’s handling of two players as Thomas Tuchel waits in the wings appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: 'I've seen Man Utd's latest 'Project' and it's laughable - they're miles behind top teams'
arts.sum: "United are so far behind the top teams in the country that only the most blinkered Stretford Ender would genuinely believe that they will close the gap in the space of four years."

arts.ttl: Ruud Gullit makes concerning Man Utd statement as summer transfer mistake made
arts.sum: Joshua Zirkzee was one of several Manchester United recruits in the summer but he's not scored since his debut as Ruud Gullit underlines the dangers of playing for the Premier League side

arts.ttl: Ole Gunnar Solskjaer embarrassment gives Erik ten Hag unlikely lifeline as Man Utd boss
arts.sum: A LOOK BACK: Manchester United's tough start to the season echoes their struggles from the 2019-20 campaign, but on that occasion their faith in the manager reaped rewards
